Join

Succeed at EPFLfrom Day One

A structured summer preparation program to arrive confident in September. Courses, exercises, and support from EPFL students.

View PricingHow It Works

Programme complet

Juin → Septembre

Why prepare?

EPFL is Demanding

Every year, many students are surprised by the intensity of the first weeks. We know—we've been there.

Fast Pace

The volume of material is substantial from day one. Courses move quickly, without waiting.

Autonomy Expected

No one will tell you when to study. You're responsible for your own organization and progress.

Strong Foundations Required

High school math and physics are assumed to be mastered. Gaps are costly.

Demanding Environment

Your classmates come from all over Europe with varying levels. You need to be ready to adapt.

Our Method

Complete Preparation

Courses + exercises + Zoom sessions for correction and Q&A. Everything you need to arrive confident.

Structured Courses

Clear lessons on math and physics fundamentals, adapted to EPFL level.

Practical Exercises

Progressive exercise sets to consolidate each concept and develop the right reflexes.

Weekly Zoom Sessions

Exercise correction, Q&A, and advice about life at EPFL. Live every week.

Continuous Support

A space to ask questions and connect with other future EPFL students.

Zoom hebdo

Chaque semaine

Who is it for?

Is This for You?

This program is for future EPFL students who want to maximize their chances of success.

  • You're starting at EPFL next September
  • You want to consolidate your foundations before classes begin
  • You'd rather arrive confident than stressed
  • You're looking for a structured framework to prepare
Who are we?

Three students, one mission

Notre expérience

We are three EPFL students who have lived through the first year. We felt unprepared for the intensity and demands of the school. Gaps in math and physics cost us dearly in time and stress.

Notre mission

After going through these challenges, we decided to take action. Our goal: give future students the tools we wish we had. Prepare the next generation so they arrive confident and ready to succeed.

Ready to Start Strong?

Summer preparation before EPFL starts. From €49/month.

View Pricing

Join the Waitlist

Leave your details and we'll contact you when registration opens.
